seoTitle: Coowonga vs Cooyar — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Coowonga and Cooyar. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Coowonga and Cooyar.
heading: Coowonga vs Cooyar — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Coowonga, Queensland and Cooyar, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cooyar has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Coowonga (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Coowonga or Cooyar safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Coowonga has a flood risk score of 54/100, while Cooyar scores 53/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Coowonga scores 57/100 for bushfire risk. Cooyar scores 22/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Coowonga or Cooyar?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cooyar has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.48% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
